policies.remote: Acme engineering may work remotely up to three days per week. Wednesday is the shared office day.
policies.expense: Acme employees can reimburse approved home-office equipment up to USD 1,500 within 90 days of onboarding.
policies.security: Production data access requires manager approval, MFA, and an audit ticket linked to the incident or project.

INC-1001.summary: Intermittent latency on the billing API.

policies.remote: Globex staff use a hybrid schedule. Department heads define office days and exceptions.
policies.expense: Globex equipment purchases above USD 500 require procurement pre-approval.
policies.security: Customer exports require a data-processing ticket and security review before release.
